title: Chapter 1: The Evolution of Product Management

questions.text: True or False? The core competencies required of product managers in 2010 are identical to those required in 2026.
questions.hint: AI and data-driven tooling have drastically shifted core competencies over the last 15 years.

questions.text: Which industry origin is most commonly cited as the birthplace of modern product management?
questions.hint: The 'brand man' memo in 1931 is widely regarded as the origin of product management.

sections.heading: Your PM Evolution
sections.prompt: Reflect on how your own PM competencies have shifted over the past 5 years. What skills have become more important? What skills have become less relevant?

templates.name: Competency Shift Matrix
templates.description: Map how PM competencies have evolved across industry eras.

templates.name: PM Evolution Timeline
templates.description: Visual timeline of product management paradigm shifts.
